ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "borough_group" TEXT /* Borough group the neighborhood belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the neighborhood */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the neighborhood */,
  "area_sq_mi" REAL /* Area of the neighborhood in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "covid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each COVID-19 data entry */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood this data belongs to */,
  "case_count" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 cases */,
  "case_rate" REAL /* Rate of COVID-19 cases per 100,000 people */,
  "death_count" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 deaths */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Rate of COVID-19 deaths per 100,000 people */,
  "positive_rate" REAL /* Percentage of positive COVID-19 tests */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 tests conducted */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("covid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood this data belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the neighborhood */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the neighborhood (people per sq. mile) */,
  "age_median" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "income_median" REAL /* Median household income */,
  "education_level" REAL /* Percentage of population with a bachelor's degree or higher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip code */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood this zip code belongs to */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zip_codes_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, healthcare professional) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "data_viewed" TEXT /* Data viewed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhood_boroughs" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id", "borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_testing" (
  "testing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing data entry */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood this data belongs to */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the tests were conducted */,
  "positive_tests" INTEGER /* Number of positive tests */,
  "total_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., PCR, antigen) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("testing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_testing_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "external_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the external source */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was integrated with the system */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation entry */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data being validated */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule applied */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, CSV, database) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was made */,
  "data_used" TEXT /* Data used in the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_publications_data_used FOREIGN KEY ("data_used") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_name")
)
